headline: Is SpaceX’s Starlink a Real Threat to AT&T and Verizon?
summary: The three telecoms get another look from Wall Street. It could have been better. It could have been worse.

headline: Verizon (VZ) Launches Carrier Fraud Tool As SOVA Deal Expands Enterprise Reach
summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ), AT&T, and T-Mobile introduced a network-based mobile number authentication solution aimed at reducing AI-driven identity theft in the US. The carrier collaboration targets rising telecom-related fraud by embedding verification directly at the network level across their mobile systems. Separately, Endeavor Managed Services completed the acquisition of the largest Verizon-exclusive enterprise agent, expanding Verizon’s reach in connectivity and lifecycle...

headline: Should BT–Verizon Global Enterprise Joint Venture Reshape Cash Flow Expectations for Verizon Communications (VZ) Investors?
summary: In late June, BT Group and Verizon Communications agreed to combine their international enterprise operations into a 50:50 joint venture serving more than 3,000 customers across over 180 countries, with Verizon making a US$625 million equalization payment and completion targeted for 2027, subject to regulatory approvals. This alliance creates a large-scale, cloud- and AI-focused enterprise connectivity platform that could reshape how multinational clients source secure cross-border...

headline: How SpaceX Spending Spree Could Threaten AT&T, Verizon, T-Mobile
summary: Telecom growth could boost SpaceX stock. Some analysts expect Starlink capital spending to surge to expand broadband, wireless services.

headline: Why Verizon’s (VZ) Income Appeal Shows the Limits of Qualified Dividend Tax Efficiency
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) is one of the dividend stocks picked by financial media as investors ask whether dividend stocks are tax-efficient. On June 4, Verizon said its board declared a quarterly dividend of 70.75 cents per outstanding share, consistent with the prior quarter’s rate. The dividend is payable August 3 to shareholders of record […]

headline: Wells Fargo cautious on AT&T, Verizon and T-Mobile as Starlink looms
summary: Investing.com -- Wells Fargo initiated coverage of the three major U.S. wireless carriers with a cautious sector outlook, flagging SpaceX's Starlink as a growing competitive threat to fixed wireless access and postpaid account growth across the industry.

raw.headline: Wells Fargo cautious on AT&T, Verizon and T-Mobile as Starlink looms

headline: Aduna with Major U.S. Carriers Introduces Network-Based Authentication as an alternative to SMS Codes
summary: Aduna, a leading global provider of standardized network APIs, today announced a major leap forward in digital security designed to reduce fraud across the U.S. mobile ecosystem. In collaboration with AT&T, T-Mobile, and Verizon, Aduna is rolling out a network solution engineered to help protect millions of US mobile users from the rising tide of AI-driven identity theft.

headline: The Case For VZ Stock Survives One Real Flaw
summary: After a steep pullback, this telecom giant looks cheap, but the market's discount could be a warning sign about the business itself.
